featureName: BUG-025-002: Knowledge synthesis E2E external URL extraction failure

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for knowledge synthesis E2E external URL extraction failure. No source or parent certification fields modified.

Replaced the required knowledge synthesis E2E external URL fixture with deterministic text-only capture and added an external-URL regression guard. Focused E2E, check, format, and artifact lint passed; broad E2E timed out with exit 124 before later baseline validation cleared the suite-level blocker.

Implementation-stage test evidence covered focused red/green knowledge synthesis E2E behavior and the required external-URL guard; validation later ran the regression-quality guard and used the c6d2b26 full E2E baseline for broad-suite closure.
Ran regression-quality guard for tests/e2e/knowledge_synthesis_test.go; it detected an adversarial signal and returned 0 violations, 0 warnings.

Closeout reviewed the delivered change boundary and found the repair stayed minimal: the required E2E fixture moved to deterministic text-only input with a focused guard, and no product API or runtime behavior was broadened.
Stabilization blocker cleared using focused post-fix E2E evidence plus the later c6d2b26 full E2E baseline, which records the broad suite green.

Security closeout confirmed the packet did not add auth, secret, permission, or production network-fetch behavior; removing the required non-owned URL dependency reduces external-network exposure in the E2E gate.
Validated BUG-025-002 closure from existing focused knowledge synthesis E2E evidence, the regression-quality guard, and the later c6d2b26 full E2E baseline.
Audited packet consistency: bug.md, scopes.md, uservalidation.md, report.md, and state.json agree on Fixed/Verified/Closed status with edits confined to the BUG-025-002 packet.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered knowledge synthesis external URL blocker. No prior bug folder existed under specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer.

Replaced the required knowledge synthesis E2E external URL fixture with deterministic text-only capture and added an external-URL regression guard. Focused E2E, check, format, and artifact lint passed; broad E2E timed out with exit 124 before later baseline validation cleared the suite-level blocker.

Validated closure from existing evidence: pre-fix focused E2E reproduced the external URL extraction failure, post-fix focused E2E passed with deterministic text-only capture, the regression-quality guard detected an adversarial signal, no product API/security surface changed, and the c6d2b26 full E2E baseline was green.
Audited packet closeout fields and evidence formatting before final artifact lint. Edits remained confined to the BUG-025-002 packet.

failures.summary: Knowledge synthesis e2e failed on external URL extraction before the deterministic fixture fix.
